Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Eugene Chang, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Redwood Mortgage Investors VI, a California limited partnership, Redwood Mortgage Investors VII, a California limited partnership and Redwood Mortgage Investors VIII, a California limited partnership.
No appearance by defendant Stagehouse Lofts, a California corporation.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant 1168 Folsom LLC, a California limited liability company was filed on May 11, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant George F. Hauser, an individual, was filed on October 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 18, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Redwood Mortgage Investors VI, a California limited partnership, Redwood Mortgage Investors VII, a California limited partnership and Redwood Mortgage Investors VIII, a California limited partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant Stagehouse Lofts, a California corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,344,784.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney Fees - $13,783.50.
Costs - $475.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $3,359,042.65.

Counsel shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than Friday, December 3, 2010.
